nodes.question: Hi! Are you the right person to talk to about your home loan enquiry?
Great! Roughly what loan amount are you looking for?
nodes.retryMessage: I'm sorry, I didn't catch the loan amount. Could you tell me approximately how much loan you're looking for?

nodes.question: Perfect. And what's the best name to put on the file?
nodes.retryMessage: I'm sorry, I didn't catch your name. Could you please tell me your full name?

nodes.message: Thanks {{name}} — someone will call you about your {{budget}} enquiry shortly. 📞
No problem at all! If you know who handles this, feel free to have them reach out to us. Have a great day! 👋
